rulings.Case Title: BARBARA HAMMES et al VS. HAIGHT & FILLMORE ASSOCIATES LP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Barbara Hammes, Alyssa Landy And Noelle Narez'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs' Special Interrogatories To Russell Flynn, Sets One And Two; Request For Sanctions Of $1,200.00 Against Defendant And His Counsel Of Record Catherine Golden
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 2, 2015 line 1. Plaintiffs Barbara Hammes, Alyssa Landy And Noelle Narez'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs' Special Interrogatories To Russell Flynn, Sets One And Two; Request For Sanctions Of $1,200.00 Against Defendant And His Counsel Of Record Catherine Golden GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted as to Interrogatory 1 (response need only include Defendant's Residential properties owned before 6/13/79) and 37 (response need only list tenants who lived at the apartment building for two years before the fire). Motion is denied as to Interrogatories 38 and 39 and Plaintiff's request for sanctions. The remained of the motion is moot in light of supplemental responses. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HOYOUNG HUH VS. JASON R MANN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Re-Notice Of Defendant Jason Manns Motion And Motion To Quash Plaintiffs Service Of Process And Summons Of Complaint On The Grounds Of Invalid Service And Lack Of Jurisdiction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 2, 2015 line 5. DEFENDANT JASON MANN's Re-Notice Motion To Quash Plaintiffs Service Of Process And Summons Of Complaint On The Grounds Of Invalid Service And Lack Of Jurisdiction GRANTED, Plaintiff failed to carry its burden to show proper service. See Lebel v. Mai (2012) 210 Cal.App.4th 1154 = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HOYOUNG HUH VS. JASON R MANN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Plaintiffs Service Of Process And Summons Of Complaint On The Grounds Of Invalid Service And Lack Of Jurisdiction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 2, 2015 line 5. DEFENDANTS RICHARD MANN and CHERYL MANN Motion To Quash Plaintiffs Service Of Process And Summons Of Complaint On The Grounds Of Invalid Service And Lack Of Jurisdiction DENIED. Defendants were the recorded title owners of the California Property at issue in this action at the time the cause of action arose, complaint was filed and service was effectuated. Defendant's being "haled" into California courts in connection with the property owned in California comports with "fair play and substantial justice." = (501/REQ)
